title.en: In the following days, another high-level realm...

content.en:
In the following days, another high-level realm god came to Ye Tian to trade.

After all, they were naturally willing to exchange the Black Leaf Demon Gold they didn't need for some useful resources for them.

But Ye Tian obviously sensed that these high-level realm gods all had a hint of peeping.

He didn't care, though.

He just needs to be able to trade the Black Leaf Demon Gold, and nothing else matters.

......

Soon after, Ye Tian obtained a lot of Black Leaf Demon Gold.

However, these Black Leaf Demon Gold may not be enough, but at least they can save Ye Tian countless years of penance time.

Other than that.

The resources and treasures he obtained from the Crack Realm of the Eastern Black Realm were enough for his wife and children to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and there was a great probability of condensing the sixth Perfect Grade Eternal Dao Seed.

In fact, his wife and children were already on the verge of raising the Eternal Way to the limit.

Really.

Not long ago, his wife Xiao Yue took the lead in raising the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian had prepared enough resources for him, many of which could improve the success rate of condensing the Eternal Dao Species, and the superposition of many resources, coupled with the fact that his wife was cultivating the method of perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, the success rate was still very high.

After everything was ready, Xiao Yue began to attack the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak realm to condense the sixth Eternal Realm Spirit.

This time, Ye Tian personally guarded it, so that if something went wrong, he would be able to rescue him in time.

But fortunately, nothing happened.

Xiao Yue broke through perfectly, condensed the sixth perfect level Eternal Realm Spirit, and cultivated to reach the peak cultivation of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and her combat power skyrocketed a lot.

Soon after, Ye Xingyue and Ye Xingchen also broke through one after another, condensing the sixth Eternal Realm Spirit, and their strength also skyrocketed.

......

"That's right, my wife and daughter have now reached the peak level of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and just like me, they are all equivalent to the powerful high-level realm god combat power

！"

Ye Tian muttered.

If they go to the realm of the Eastern Wu Realm Seam, they can definitely sweep invincible, unless they encounter the most top-level high-level realm gods, and when the strength of the high-level realm gods is suppressed, it is possible to compete with them.

But those high-level realm gods didn't dare to enter at will, and they were easy to be besieged and killed.

Of course.

Ye Tian would not let his wife and children enter there and kill them, otherwise anyone would guess that the human race had 100% the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance and the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance.

Now, they are only suspicious, after all, his combat power can be explained by some kind of special treasure.

But if it's like this one by one, then it's not something that a treasure can explain!

At the same time, a large number of Terran Realm Gods were also born, and there were also several Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level cultivators, and there were even more Primary-level Realm Gods.

It can be said that the number and strength of the gods of the human race are now comparable to those of some powerful forces, except for Ye Tian and a few others.

And this is just the beginning, as time passes, the strength of the human race will grow by leaps and bounds.

......

Due to Ye Tian's continuous killing of demon seeds in the realm of the crack of the Eastern Wu Realm, the strength of the demon seed continued to decrease, which also made the pressure of the Dongwu realm drop sharply, and now there is no big pressure, and the demon seed of the abyss of the demon seed can already be resisted in the realm of the crack of the Eastern Wu realm.

According to this, even if they can't completely occupy the boundary of the East Wu Boundary, they will be able to keep this place, and they don't need to ask for help from forces outside the East Wu Realm.

However, they also knew very well that the reason why they were able to achieve such a situation had something to do with Ye Tian.

But they are not very happy to let these powerful realm gods participate in it and take away some of the resources.

Thereupon.

A group of high-level realm gods found Ye Tian and wanted to discuss a matter with Ye Tian.

"I've seen the gods of the Ancient Realm!"

Ye Tian saw the god of the Guya Realm.

Unexpectedly, this one from the Dongwu Ancient Sect came.

"Ye Tian, we have something to discuss with you!" "The Gu Ya Realm God said: "At present, the situation in the East Wu Realm is stable, we don't need those powerful forces to participate, if we continue to participate, the time is too long, and if we want them to withdraw, we will definitely not agree." "

"Let the powerful pull out?"

Ye Tian frowned.

At the beginning, the top forces couldn't bear it in the seam of the East Wu Realm, so they let these powerful forces participate.

In these years, many powerful forces have suffered heavy losses, and even the realm gods of powerful forces have all been destroyed.

But now, the top forces are going to cross the river and tear down the bridge, which is indeed too shameless.

Just as Ye Tian retorted, the Gu Ya Realm God said again: "'Ye Tian Realm God, you can continue to stay in the East Wu Realm Seam Realm, and you don't need to leave. "

Ye Tiandao: "Guya Realm Gods, that is to say, apart from me, the realm gods of other powerful forces have to leave the realm of the Eastern Wu Realm?"

"Yes!" Guya Realm God responded: "There are a lot of powerful forces, and with the supply of resources in the Eastern Wu Realm Seam, they will give birth to many middle-level realm gods in the future, and these middle-level realm gods will inevitably snatch a lot of resources when they enter here, and the top forces are naturally not happy." And you are different, the human race will inevitably become the top power, and you are one of us early and late, so it is naturally permissible to let you stay here all the time. "

"Guya Realm God, I can only stabilize the situation by staying here!"

Ye Tian directly pierced the flickering of the gods of the Guya Realm and said bluntly.

The Guya Realm God was not embarrassed, and smiled slightly: "That's true, but Ye Tianjie God, you have also obtained a lot of resources from here, and we can be regarded as a win-win situation!"

Ye Tian pondered for a while and did not answer.

But he knew very well that with his current strength, he still couldn't compete with these top forces in the Eastern Ukraine Realm.

For example, this Guya Realm God, he can't be an opponent to get pregnant now.

It's just that he hasn't suppressed his strength in the realm of the Eastern Wu Realm, and those high-level demon seeds will be easily killed by him.

But in the outside world, his strength is just a high-level realm god comparable to eight Eternal Realm Spirits, which is not too powerful.

So.

He was not qualified to compete with such a top force as the Dongwu Ancient Sect, so there was no need to offend them.

Moreover, there is no need for him to protect the interests of all powerful forces.

"Guya Realm God, I agree!"

Ye Tian nodded and said.
